race.comment: OAKFIELD GALAXY (6) was a touch disappointing last time out but go on the solid runner-up finish at the Gold Coast two back. Has placed over this track and trip and gets some weight relief with the 1.5kg claim. Sure to be right there when the whips are cracking. BIG TECH (1) will be ready to peak now fourth run back from a spell and is drawn to get a cosy run in transit from the inside marble. Gets his chance to break the ice. HELL TO THE LINE (2) is knocking on the door of a maiden victory finishing runner-up in three of his past four starts. Has to be included in calculations. CONTINENT (4) resumes here but showed ability when last in work and has revved up for this with two recent trials. Should be hitting the line with gusto. KIDS INTHE KITCHEN (3) next best despite the wide draw.
